title: feat: tag AI Dungeon media
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Publishes saved generated images to the `ai-dungeon-master` gallery
- Uses the current `media.pollinations.ai/upload` endpoint
- Keeps upload failures non-blocking

Checks: Biome, esbuild, mocked multipart contract

gist.headline: Dungeon loot joins the gallery
gist.blurb: Saved AI Dungeon scenes now find their way into the ai-dungeon-master gallery. The upload wagon keeps rolling even if one picture gets lost in the woods.
gist.summary: AI Dungeon Master now publishes saved generated images to the ai-dungeon-master gallery through the existing media.pollinations.ai/upload endpoint, while keeping upload failures non-blocking.
gist.impact: Players can discover saved dungeon imagery in the gallery without a failed gallery upload interrupting their game flow.
gist.visual_concept: Depict a cozy fantasy dungeon gallery where Polly, wearing a tiny explorer hat and carrying a framed generated landscape, pins dungeon artwork onto a vine-covered gallery wall. A small retro terminal routes glowing image postcards toward the gallery, with pixel flowers growing around the upload station to show that the game continues even if one delivery drifts away.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and a tiny explorer hat, carefully hanging a framed fantasy dungeon image in a vine-covered ai-dungeon-master gallery while a retro terminal sends glowing image postcards along a garden path. Prominent lime green (#ecf874) gallery glow, soft mint, lavender, peach, and warm cream gradients, pixel flowers and code-plants, cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes; pixel-font sign reads “GALLERY”. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

Prominent lime green (#ecf874) gallery glow, soft mint, lavender, peach, and warm cream gradients, pixel flowers and code-plants, cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes; pixel-font sign reads “GALLERY”.
